raw_title: Snap Decisions: How Open Libraries for Accelerated Data Processing Boost A/B Testing for Snapchat
raw_content: The features on social media apps like Snapchat evolve nearly as fast as what’s trending. To keep pace, its parent company Snap has adopted open data processing libraries from NVIDIA on Google Cloud services to boost development. Every new feature rolled out to Snapchat’s more than 940 million monthly active users goes through a set […]
